message:
refactor(tests): propagate Result types through E2E tests and test_utils

Update all E2E tests and test utilities to use Result types
consistently with the updated E2EFixture API.

E2E test changes:
- All test functions now return Result<()> to propagate errors
- create_skill() and create_skill_in_layer() calls use ? operator
- Import ms::error::Result in each test module

Tests updated:
  fresh_install.rs:
    - test_fresh_install_to_search() -> Result<()>
    - test_search_no_results() -> Result<()>
    - test_load_missing_skill() -> Result<()>

  layer_conflict.rs:
    - test_project_layer_skill_loading() -> Result<()>
    - test_multiple_project_skills() -> Result<()>
    - test_layer_priority_resolution() -> Result<()>

  skill_creation.rs:
    - test_skill_creation_workflow() -> Result<()>
    - test_skill_update_workflow() -> Result<()>
    - test_skill_with_complex_metadata() -> Result<()>

test_utils/mod.rs:
  - run_table_tests() now returns Result<(), String>
  - Replaces panic!/assert! with error returns
  - Provides detailed error messages for test failures

This completes the error handling refactor across the test suite,
ensuring test failures provide actionable error information rather
than panic traces.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
